ORDER RE: MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANT HORIZON LINES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NUMBERS 5 AND 6. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 2.4. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY NUMBERS 2.6 AND 8.7. THE RESPONSES ARE INADEQUATE. PLAINTIFF MUST RESPOND AFTER REASONABLE AND DILIGENT SEARCH AND INQUIRY. THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY NUMBER 6.5 AND 6.7. THE RESPONSES ARE INADEQUATE. THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NUMBERS 3 AND 4. THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. PLAINTIFF MUST RESPOND AFTER REASONABLE AND DILIGENT SEARCH AND INQUIRY. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE SHALL BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-02-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-16-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogaotires, Form Interrogatories, And Requests For Production; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Kevin Odell, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Horizon Lines, LLC; Arnold Berschler, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Faisal A. Zain

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified: Defendant Horizon Lines, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Request For Production is granted as to Special Interrogatory Numbers 5 and 6. Plaintiff's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory No. 2.4. The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Numbers 2.6 and 8.7. The responses are inadequate. Plaintiff must respond after reasonable and diligent search and inquiry. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Number 6.5 and 6.7. The responses are inadequate. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Numbers 3 and 4. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff must respond after reasonable and diligent search and inquiry. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity.
All requests for sanctions are denied.
Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
